top_visual_formats: Official cinematic music videos with high production value and artist styling
Audio visualizers with minimal design (animated typography, geometric patterns)
dominant_emotion: Swagger and confidence — hip-hop and K-pop attitude dominates, with emphasis on prestige and exclusivity
oversaturated: Official music video drops with artist name in title; hip-hop trap production; K-pop idol releases; celebrity lifestyle content
hook_pattern_of_day: Artist name + 'Official [Video/Audio]' or numbered releases ('2.0', album cycle markers); capitalized, prestige-forward titles
contrarian_gap: Spiritual/meditative electronic music with narrative journey and sacred geometry visuals — zero presence in trending data; untapped space for Melodic Techno/Tribal Psytrance as 'awakening soundtrack' vs. consumer entertainment
